About Carlos

Faith. Fitness. Pharmacy.

My Journey

More than a gym page.

My name is Carlos, and I am currently a second-year pharmacy student with a passion for fitness, health, and faith. I started my fitness journey two years ago, and through that process I learned that discipline is not just built in the gym — it carries into every area of life.

Fitness has helped me grow physically, mentally, and spiritually. It has taught me consistency, patience, confidence, and the importance of taking care of the body God has given me.

Forged in Purpose is built to help people train with structure, eat with intention, recover properly, and grow in discipline through a faith-centered approach.

I help people build strength, lose fat, improve consistency, and create realistic habits that fit their lifestyle. The goal is not just to give you workouts, but to help you understand how to train, how to fuel your body, and how to stay committed when motivation fades.

The faith-based side of Forged in Purpose is about seeing fitness as stewardship. Your body is something God has entrusted to you, and taking care of it can become part of your discipline, character, and purpose.

Built on four pillars.

Faith & Mindset

Discipline hits different when it has purpose.
Forged Standard

Train With Purpose

Training is more than movement. It is a daily commitment to becoming stronger, more disciplined, and more confident.

Forged Standard

Fuel With Intention

Nutrition is not about punishment. It is about learning how to fuel your body with wisdom, balance, and consistency.

Forged Standard

Recover to Rebuild

Growth does not only happen during training. It happens when you rest, recover, and allow your body to rebuild.

Faith & Mindset

Strength beyond the body.

True strength is not only measured by what you lift. It is seen in how you think, how you live, how you respond to hardship, and how you walk with God.

“You are not just training to look better. You are being forged into who God called you to become.”

The Process

What you’re really building.

Training

You do not need more random workouts. You need direction.

Most people walk into the gym without a plan and wonder why they are not seeing progress. Training through Forged in Purpose is built to give you structure, confidence, and a clear path forward so every session has a reason behind it.

  • Strength and muscle-building structure
  • Fat loss-focused training direction
  • Beginner-friendly exercise options
  • Sets, reps, rest times, and weekly structure
  • Progressive overload guidance

Nutrition

Eating better should not feel impossible.

Nutrition is not about starving yourself, cutting everything out, or following extreme diets. With my pharmacy school background, I hope to use my growing knowledge of health and wellness to help you fuel your body, build realistic habits, and move closer to your nutrition goals with clarity.

  • Protein and meal structure guidance
  • Simple nutrition habits
  • Hydration and fueling strategies
  • Better food choices without overcomplicating it
  • Support for your fitness goals

Recovery

If you never recover, you never fully grow.

Progress is not only built during the workout. Your body needs rest, sleep, hydration, and proper recovery to rebuild stronger. This pillar helps you understand how to take care of your body outside the gym so you can keep showing up inside the gym.

  • Sleep and rest day habits
  • Hydration support
  • Mobility and stretching guidance
  • Soreness management
  • Burnout prevention

Faith & Mindset

This is bigger than looking better.

Forged in Purpose is about becoming stronger physically, mentally, and spiritually. Fitness can become a way to practice discipline, stewardship, humility, and consistency while becoming who God has called you to be.

  • Faith-based encouragement
  • Discipline and consistency
  • Stewardship of the body
  • Purpose-driven motivation
  • Mindset tools for staying committed
